blocks.content: In this milestone, you'll install Grafana Alloy and add the Database Observability configuration blocks for MySQL. Alloy collects both metrics and structured logs from your database and forwards them to Grafana Cloud.

## Install Grafana Alloy

Install Grafana Alloy 1.14.0 or later. Refer to the [Alloy installation documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/alloy/latest/get-started/install/) for your platform.

Run Alloy with the public preview stability flag:

```bash
alloy run config.alloy --stability.level=public-preview
```

## Create the DSN secret file

Create a file with the Data Source Name string that Alloy uses to connect to your MySQL database. Replace the placeholders with your values:

```bash
echo 'db-o11y:<DB_PASSWORD>@tcp(<DB_HOST>:<DB_PORT>)/' > /var/lib/alloy/mysql_secret
```

Replace:
- `<DB_PASSWORD>` — Password for the `db-o11y` user you created
- `<DB_HOST>` — Hostname or IP of your MySQL server
- `<DB_PORT>` — MySQL port (default: 3306)
In the next milestone, you'll verify that telemetry is flowing to Grafana Cloud.
